code:
fn double_positive(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if n > 0
    Ok(2 * n)
  else
    Err("non-positive")
  end
end

fn add_ten(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  Ok(n + 10)
end

fn run(_ n: Int) -> Unit
  match double_positive(n)
  when Ok(v)
    match add_ten(v)
    when Ok(r)
      println("result=#{r}")
    when Err(e)
      println("error=#{e}")
    end
  when Err(e)
    println("error=#{e}")
  end
end

run(5)
run(-3)
